children.text:
Welcome to the Norwegian iConcierge Dining feature. 

Once onboard, connect to the Norwegian iConcierge WiFi network by choosing NCL_Internet_"Ship Name" to view restaurant information and menus.  You can also make dinner reservations at a variety of restaurants onboard right from your mobile device.

There is no charge to connect to the ship’s WiFi network to use Norwegian iConcierge services. Separate internet access is available at a nominal charge.
